name: io.github.rosekamallove/letmepost
description: MCP server for letmepost.dev. Publish across 8 social platforms from any agent.

environmentVariables.name: LMP_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your letmepost.dev API key (lmp_live_... or lmp_test_...). Create one at https://dashboard.letmepost.dev/api-keys.

environmentVariables.name: LMP_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: Override for self-hosted deployments. Defaults to https://api.letmepost.dev.
